item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students still working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started.

item.title: A message from Mr. Cornellier.
item.description: This is a reminder that the first slo-pitch tryout is this Wednesday, from 2:30 to 3:45.Don't forget to get your permission form.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Congratulations to "Spike City" for winning last week's lunchtime volleyball tournament in support of CrossFit Team. Players who responded to Mrs. Longval's Smoothie Form are asked to pick up their personal smoothie at 10:45am in her office.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval :
item.description: Weight Room is OPEN this week - today, Tuesday and Wednesday at lunch.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Mrs. Longval's period 2 Grade 9 physical education class are asked to meet in the gymnasium for class today. Students will "shoot around" with Mr. Longval's class and then head over to the weight room.

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
A message from Ms. Montgomery.
item.description: The first two varsity baseball tryouts will be Wednesday and Thursday this week after school. Please see me for your Athlete Participation form if you have not handed yours in.
